---
mode: agent
agent: stakeholder-communicator-reporter
description: Write a short executive summary for senior leadership from sprint or project data.
---

# Executive Summary

Write a 3-paragraph executive summary for senior leadership.

## Input

```
{{project_data}}
```

*(paste sprint summary, status report, or project overview. Can be notes, email, or screenshot content)*

---

## What to do

1. **Paragraph 1 — What happened:** Key achievements this period, in business terms
2. **Paragraph 2 — What it means:** Business impact, user benefit, or strategic value
3. **Paragraph 3 — What's next:** Upcoming milestone, key focus, any decision needed

Keep it under 150 words total. Written for someone reading it between meetings.

## Output Format

---
**[Project Name] — Executive Update**
**[Date or Sprint Period]**

[Paragraph 1 — achievements]

[Paragraph 2 — business impact]

[Paragraph 3 — next steps / decisions]

---

> No bullet points in this format. Flowing text only. No story points, no sprint velocity.
